svg.title: PerSPARMA architecture flowchart
svg.desc: Full architecture flowchart from physical reality through sensor layer, world and self modules, Z_relation perspective, skill boundary, decision module, action chunk, embodiment, and reality alignment feedback loop

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is the role of physical reality in PerSPARMA?')
sendPrompt('What sensors does PerSPARMA use and why?')
sendPrompt('How does the World Module work in PerSPARMA?')
sendPrompt('How does the Self Module work in PerSPARMA?')
sendPrompt('What is Z_relation and how does perspective form in PerSPARMA?')
sendPrompt('How does skill boundary detection work in PerSPARMA?')
sendPrompt('How does the Decision Module work and what is alpha(t)?')
sendPrompt('What is an action chunk and how does adaptive chunk length work?')
sendPrompt('How does the embodiment abstraction layer work?')
sendPrompt('How does reality alignment drive growth in PerSPARMA?')
